target_capability: Route an ambiguous AI-engineering request to the correct skill and preserve a verifiable delivery path.

released_this_round.reason: Test whether a structurally similar but differently worded request still routes correctly.
released_this_round.expected_learning: Separate route-signal weakness from general skill-execution quality.

consequence_budget: Local read-only route check; no global install, publish, or production mutation.

pass: The request routes to paranoia-ai-system-evolver and returns ul-state.
fail: The request routes to a domain skill or loses the UL output.
confounded: Router source, skill metadata, and fixture change in the same probe.
stop: The route is stable on the target and negative-transfer cases.

attribution_gate.discriminating_probe: Hold the router contract constant and vary only the request wording.

near: A second AI-engineering phrasing with the same structure.
medium: A workflow-governance request that does not mention UL.
negative_transfer: A player-learning-curve request should remain in the appropriate domain skill.

rollback: Remove the UL route signals and restore the previous candidate router contract.
stop_rule: Stop after the target route and negative-transfer route both pass without widening authority.

human_gate.reason: The probe is local, reversible, and has no real-user consequence.
